501.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: When we came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, each of us would sit wherever he found a place — there was no pushing or jostling.
501.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Apabila kami datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, masing-masing dari kami akan duduk di mana pun ia menemukan tempat — tidak ada saling dorong atau berdesakan.

502.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had a Jewish man and a Jewish woman stoned for fornication.
502.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ merajam seorang laki-laki Yahudi dan seorang perempuan Yahudi karena zina.

503.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that there was no adhan called for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for the two Eid prayers.
503.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa tidak ada adzan yang dikumandangkan untuk Rasulullah ﷺ pada shalat dua hari raya.

504.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man killed himself and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not perform the funeral prayer over him.
504.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki membunuh dirinya sendiri dan Rasulullah ﷺ tidak menyalatinya.

505.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'This religion will remain standing, with a group fighting for it, until the Hour comes.'
505.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Agama ini akan tetap tegak, dengan sekelompok orang yang berjuang untuknya, hingga Kiamat tiba.'

506.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'After me there will be twelve caliphs, all of them from Quraysh.' He then returned home, and the Quraysh came to him and asked: 'And what comes after?' He said: 'Then there will be turmoil.'
506.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Setelahku akan ada dua belas khalifah, semuanya dari Quraisy.' Kemudian beliau pulang ke rumah, dan orang-orang Quraisy datang kepadanya dan bertanya: 'Lalu apa setelah itu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Kemudian akan ada kekacauan.'

507.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was informed of a man who had slaughtered himself with a broad-headed arrow. He said: 'In that case, I will not pray over him.'
507.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ diberitahu tentang seorang laki-laki yang telah menyembelih dirinya sendiri dengan anak panah berkepala lebar. Beliau bersabda: 'Kalau begitu, aku tidak akan menyalatinya.'

508.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'After me there will be twelve commanders.' He then said a word I did not understand. I asked those around me, and they told me he said: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
508.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Setelahku akan ada dua belas pemimpin.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku pahami. Aku bertanya kepada orang-orang di sekitarku, dan mereka memberitahuku bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

509.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Before the Hour there will be liars.' Someone asked: 'Did you yourself hear this?' He said: 'Yes, I heard it myself.'
509.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sebelum Kiamat akan ada para pendusta.' Seseorang bertanya: 'Apakah kamu sendiri yang mendengar ini?' Ia berkata: 'Ya, aku sendiri yang mendengarnya.'

510.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man killed himself, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not pray over him.
510.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki membunuh dirinya sendiri, dan Rasulullah ﷺ tidak menyalatinya.

511.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ deliver the Friday sermon except while standing. Whoever tells you he saw him deliver it while sitting has lied — he never did that. His prayer and his sermon were both moderate in length.
511.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ menyampaikan khutbah Jumat kecuali dalam keadaan berdiri. Barangsiapa memberitahumu bahwa ia melihat beliau menyampaikan khutbah sambil duduk, maka ia telah berdusta — beliau tidak pernah melakukan itu. Shalat dan khutbah beliau keduanya sedang dalam panjangnya.

512.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: The only white hairs on the head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ were a few strands at the parting of his hair. When he applied oil, the oil would conceal them.
512.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Satu-satunya uban di kepala Rasulullah ﷺ hanyalah beberapa helai di belahan rambutnya. Apabila beliau memakai minyak, minyak itu menyembunyikannya.

513.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had Ma'iz ibn Malik stoned, without mentioning flogging.
513.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ merajam Ma'iz ibn Malik, tanpa menyebut hukuman dera.

514.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to deliver the sermon while standing.
514.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menyampaikan khutbah sambil berdiri.

515.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: 'Do I need to perform wudu after eating sheep meat?' He said: 'If you wish.' He asked: 'What about after eating camel meat?' He said: 'Yes, perform wudu after eating camel meat.'
515.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Apakah aku perlu berwudhu setelah memakan daging domba?' Beliau bersabda: 'Terserahmu.' Ia bertanya: 'Bagaimana dengan setelah memakan daging unta?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, berwudhulah setelah memakan daging unta.'

516.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ pointing with two fingers and saying: 'I was sent, and the Hour is like these two' — meaning the gap between them is close.
516.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia melihat Rasulullah ﷺ menunjuk dengan dua jari dan berkata: 'Aku diutus, dan Kiamat adalah seperti kedua ini' — yakni jaraknya dekat.

517.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When Kisra perishes, there will be no Kisra after him. When Caesar perishes, there will be no Caesar after him. By Him in Whose Hand is my soul, you will spend their treasures in the way of Allah.'
517.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila Kisra binasa, tidak akan ada Kisra setelahnya. Apabila Kaisar binasa, tidak akan ada Kaisar setelahnya. Demi Dzat yang jiwaku berada di tangan-Nya, kalian akan membelanjakan harta-harta mereka di jalan Allah.'

518.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'There will be twelve commanders.' He then said a word I did not hear. I asked those near me and they said he said: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
518.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Akan ada dua belas pemimpin.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku dengar. Aku bertanya kepada orang-orang di dekatku dan mereka berkata bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

519.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ deliver the Friday sermon except while standing. Whoever tells you he saw him preach while sitting has lied.
519.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ menyampaikan khutbah Jumat kecuali sambil berdiri. Barangsiapa memberitahumu bahwa ia melihat beliau berkhutbah sambil duduk, maka ia telah berdusta.

520.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out to his companions and found them sitting in separate groups. He said: 'Why do I see you sitting scattered in separate clusters?'
520.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ keluar menemui para sahabatnya dan mendapati mereka duduk dalam kelompok-kelompok yang terpisah. Beliau bersabda: 'Mengapa aku melihat kalian duduk berpencar dalam kelompok-kelompok yang terpisah?'

521.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered the mosque and saw people who had raised their hands. He said: 'They are raising them like the tails of agitated horses — be still during prayer.'
521.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ masuk ke masjid dan melihat orang-orang yang mengangkat tangan-tangan mereka. Beliau bersabda: 'Mereka mengangkatnya seperti ekor-ekor kuda yang gelisah — tenanglah dalam shalat.'

522.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Is not one of you afraid, when he raises his gaze during prayer, that his sight will not return to him?'
522.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apakah salah seorang di antara kalian tidak takut, ketika ia mengangkat pandangannya saat shalat, bahwa penglihatannya tidak akan kembali kepadanya?'

523.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was asked about praying in camel resting-grounds. He said: 'Do not pray there.' He was asked about praying in sheep pens. He said: 'Pray there.' He was asked about performing wudu after eating camel meat. He said: 'Perform wudu.' He was asked about eating sheep meat. He said: 'No wudu is required.'
523.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ ditanya tentang shalat di tempat-tempat unta beristirahat. Beliau bersabda: 'Jangan shalat di sana.' Beliau ditanya tentang shalat di kandang domba. Beliau bersabda: 'Shalatlah di sana.' Beliau ditanya tentang berwudhu setelah memakan daging unta. Beliau bersabda: 'Berwudhulah.' Beliau ditanya tentang memakan daging domba. Beliau bersabda: 'Tidak perlu wudhu.'

524.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to sit between the two Friday sermons, deliver them while standing, read verses from the Quran on the minbar, and his prayer and sermon were both moderate in length.
524.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ biasa duduk di antara dua khutbah Jumat, menyampaikan keduanya sambil berdiri, membaca ayat-ayat Al-Qur'an di atas mimbar, dan shalat serta khutbahnya keduanya sedang dalam panjangnya.

525.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ addressed the people and said: 'This religion will remain honourable until twelve caliphs come.' He then said a word I did not understand, and the people shouted. I asked my father what he said, and he replied: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
525.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkhutbah kepada orang-orang dan bersabda: 'Agama ini akan tetap mulia hingga dua belas khalifah datang.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku pahami, dan orang-orang berteriak. Aku bertanya kepada ayahku apa yang beliau katakan, dan ia menjawab: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

526.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ addressed them at Arafah and said: 'This matter will remain strong, impregnable, and dominant over those who oppose it, until twelve rule.' He then said something I did not understand. I asked my father what he said after 'all of them', and he replied: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
526.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkhutbah kepada mereka di Arafah dan bersabda: 'Urusan ini akan tetap kuat, kokoh, dan unggul atas mereka yang menentangnya, hingga dua belas orang memerintah.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku pahami. Aku bertanya kepada ayahku apa yang beliau katakan setelah 'semuanya', dan ia menjawab: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

527.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he sat with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ more than a hundred times.
527.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia duduk bersama Rasulullah ﷺ lebih dari seratus kali.

528.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to delay the Isha prayer.
528.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menunda shalat Isya.

529.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a companion of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ was wounded and the wound caused him great pain. He crept to a broad-headed arrow and used it to kill himself. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not pray over him.
529.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ terluka dan lukanya menyebabkan rasa sakit yang luar biasa. Ia merangkak ke sebuah anak panah berkepala lebar dan menggunakannya untuk membunuh dirinya sendiri. Rasulullah ﷺ tidak menyalatinya.

530.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man from the Jurmuqan tribe came to the companions of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and said: 'Where is this companion of yours who claims to be a prophet? If I question him, I will know whether he is a prophet or not.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ then came, and the man questioned him — and the Prophet ﷺ answered every question correctly, confirming his prophethood.
530.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki dari suku Jurmuqan datang kepada para sahabat Rasulullah ﷺ dan berkata: 'Di mana sahabat kalian ini yang mengaku sebagai nabi? Jika aku bertanya kepadanya, aku akan tahu apakah ia seorang nabi atau bukan.' Rasulullah ﷺ kemudian datang, dan laki-laki itu mengajukan pertanyaan kepadanya — dan Nabi ﷺ menjawab setiap pertanyaan dengan benar, membuktikan kenabiannya.

531.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I prayed with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and his prayer was moderate and his sermon was moderate.
531.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku shalat bersama Rasulullah ﷺ, dan shalatnya sedang dan khutbahnya sedang.

532.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to deliver two sermons, sitting between them, read from the Quran, and remind the people.
532.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menyampaikan dua khutbah, duduk di antara keduanya, membaca dari Al-Qur'an, dan mengingatkan orang-orang.

533.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Allah, the Blessed and Exalted, has named Medina Tabah.'
533.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Allah, Yang Mahasuci lagi Maha Tinggi, telah menamakan Madinah Tabah.'

534.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that when food was brought as a gift to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, he would eat some and then send the remainder to Abu Ayyub (may Allah be pleased with him). Once, food containing garlic was brought to him, and he sent it to Abu Ayyub without eating any of it. Abu Ayyub did not approve of this.
534.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa apabila makanan dibawa sebagai hadiah kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, beliau memakannya sedikit lalu mengirimkan sisanya kepada Abu Ayyub (radhiyallahu 'anhu). Suatu kali, makanan yang mengandung bawang putih dibawa kepadanya, dan beliau mengirimkannya kepada Abu Ayyub tanpa memakannya sama sekali. Abu Ayyub tidak menyukai hal ini.

535.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ had a Jewish man and a Jewish woman stoned.
535.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ merajam seorang laki-laki Yahudi dan seorang perempuan Yahudi.

536.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that there was no adhan called for the Messenger of Allah ﷺ for the two Eid prayers.
536.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa tidak ada adzan yang dikumandangkan untuk Rasulullah ﷺ pada shalat dua hari raya.

537.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man killed himself and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not perform the funeral prayer over him.
537.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki membunuh dirinya sendiri dan Rasulullah ﷺ tidak menyalatinya.

538.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'This religion will remain standing, with a group fighting for it, until the Hour comes.' Sharik said: he heard this from his brother Ibrahim ibn Harb.
538.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Agama ini akan tetap tegak, dengan sekelompok orang yang berjuang untuknya, hingga Kiamat tiba.' Syarik berkata: ia mendengar ini dari saudaranya Ibrahim ibn Harb.

539.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man slaughtered himself with a broad-headed arrow. This was mentioned to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and he said: 'In that case, I will not pray over him.'
539.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki menyembelih dirinya sendiri dengan anak panah berkepala lebar. Hal ini disebutkan kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, dan beliau bersabda: 'Kalau begitu, aku tidak akan menyalatinya.'

540.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'After me there will be twelve commanders.' He then said something I did not catch. I asked those around me, and they said he said: 'All of them from Quraysh.'
540.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Setelahku akan ada dua belas pemimpin.' Kemudian beliau mengucapkan sesuatu yang tidak aku tangkap. Aku bertanya kepada orang-orang di sekitarku, dan mereka berkata bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Semuanya dari Quraisy.'

541.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Before the Hour there will be liars.' Someone asked him: 'Did you yourself hear this?' He replied: 'Yes, I heard it myself.'
541.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sebelum Kiamat akan ada para pendusta.' Seseorang bertanya kepadanya: 'Apakah kamu sendiri yang mendengar ini?' Ia menjawab: 'Ya, aku sendiri yang mendengarnya.'

542.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that a man killed himself, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ did not pray over him.
542.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa seorang laki-laki membunuh dirinya sendiri, dan Rasulullah ﷺ tidak menyalatinya.

543.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ deliver the Friday sermon except while standing. Whoever tells you he saw him deliver it while sitting has lied — he never did that.
543.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ menyampaikan khutbah Jumat kecuali sambil berdiri. Barangsiapa memberitahumu bahwa ia melihat beliau menyampaikannya sambil duduk, maka ia telah berdusta — beliau tidak pernah melakukan itu.

544.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the only white hairs on the head of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ were a few strands at the parting of his hair. When he applied oil, the oil would conceal them.
544.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa satu-satunya uban di kepala Rasulullah ﷺ hanyalah beberapa helai di belahan rambutnya. Apabila beliau memakai minyak, minyak itu menyembunyikannya.

545.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ stoned Ma'iz ibn Malik, without mentioning flogging.
545.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ merajam Ma'iz ibn Malik, tanpa menyebut hukuman dera.

546.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I never saw the Messenger of Allah ﷺ deliver the Friday sermon except while standing. Whoever tells you he saw him deliver it while sitting has lied.
546.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku tidak pernah melihat Rasulullah ﷺ menyampaikan khutbah Jumat kecuali sambil berdiri. Barangsiapa memberitahumu bahwa ia melihat beliau menyampaikannya sambil duduk, maka ia telah berdusta.

547.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he said: I prayed both Eid prayers with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ — there was neither an adhan nor an iqama for either of them.
547.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia berkata: Aku shalat dua shalat Id bersama Rasulullah ﷺ — tidak ada adzan maupun iqama untuk keduanya.

548.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to delay the Isha prayer.
548.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa menunda shalat Isya.

549.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that he heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Before the Hour there will be liars.' He said: I asked him: 'Did you hear this yourself?' He said: 'Yes, I heard it myself, from the Messenger of Allah ﷺ.'
549.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Sebelum Kiamat akan ada para pendusta.' Ia berkata: Aku bertanya kepadanya: 'Apakah kamu mendengar ini sendiri?' Ia berkata: 'Ya, aku mendengarnya sendiri, dari Rasulullah ﷺ.'

550.iwh_en: It was narrated from Jabir ibn Samura (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I recognize a stone in Mecca that used to greet me before I was sent as a prophet. I still recognize it now.'
550.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Jabir ibn Samura (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku mengenali sebuah batu di Makkah yang biasa mengucapkan salam kepadaku sebelum aku diutus sebagai nabi. Aku masih mengenalinya sekarang.'
